overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in dark winter clothing walking through a snowy forest landscape at night. The character traverses open snow fields, passes a distinctive glowing red twisted tree, walks alongside a frozen river with rocky banks, and continues into a denser evergreen woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy field with scattered evergreens

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward a distinctive glowing red tree in the distance

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered ground with visible footprints and drifts
dense cluster of snow-laden evergreen trees forming the horizon
distinctive gnarled tree with glowing red foliage standing alone in the snow
group of gray boulders partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open snowy field at night, approaching a distinctive glowing red twisted tree. Snow-covered evergreens line the distant horizon while scattered rocks appear on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy approach to twisted red tree with rocky outcrops

events.description: character passes the glowing red twisted tree on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking past the red tree and turning slightly toward a rocky area with frozen water visible ahead

entered.detail: partially frozen waterway with ice forming along the banks
snow-dusted rocky terrain rising beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character passes the glowing red tree on the left and continues toward a rocky area. A frozen river becomes visible to the left while rocky banks rise on the right, transitioning the terrain from open field to riverside path.

scene_state.functional_zone: frozen riverbank with rocky outcrops and dense evergreens

events.description: path narrows between frozen river on left and rocky bank on right

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the narrow snow path between the frozen river and rocky terrain

entered.detail: prominent snow-covered boulders lining the riverbank
thick cluster of snow-laden evergreen trees closing in on the path

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow path squeezed between a frozen river on the left and a rocky bank on the right. Dense pine trees close in on both sides as the trail winds through the increasingly enclosed winter landscape.

events.description: path moves away from frozen water into deep forest with dense tree cover

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dense snowy forest on a narrow winding trail surrounded by evergreens

entered.detail: low shrubs blanketed in snow lining the forest path
narrow winding path through dense woodland

segments.scene_description: The trail turns away from the frozen river and enters a dense evergreen forest. The character walks between closely spaced snow-covered pines and bushes, with the path narrowing as it winds deeper into the woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide, open snowy expanse that gradually tightens into a dense evergreen forest. It begins with the character traversing a vast frozen field at night, moving toward a distinctive glowing red twisted tree while snow-covered evergreens line the distant horizon. As the character passes the red tree, the terrain shifts from an open plain to a riverside path, where a frozen river emerges on the left and rocky banks rise on the right. The scene then narrows as the path is squeezed between the icy water and the rocky slope, with pine trees closing in from both sides. Finally, the trail turns away from the river and winds deeper into a thick woodland of closely spaced snow-covered pines and bushes.
